OP13-001.name: Monkey.D.Luffy
OP13-001.effect: [DON!! x1] [On Your Opponent's Attack] If you have 5 or less active DON!! cards, you may rest any number of your DON!! cards. For every DON!! card rested this way, this Leader or up to 1 of your {Straw Hat Crew} type Characters gains +2000 power during this battle.

OP13-002.name: Portgas.D.Ace
OP13-002.effect: [On Your Opponent's Attack] [Once Per Turn] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Give up to 1 of your opponent's Leader or Character cards −2000 power during this battle.

OP13-003.name: Gol.D.Roger
OP13-003.effect: If you have any DON!! cards on your field, 1 DON!! card placed during your DON!! Phase is given to your Leader.

OP13-004.name: Sabo
OP13-004.effect: If you have 4 or more Life cards, give this Leader −1000 power.

OP13-005.name: Inazuma
OP13-005.effect: [On Play] Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your Leader.

OP13-006.name: Woop Slap
OP13-006.effect: [On Play] Give up to 2 rested DON!! cards to 1 of your [Monkey.D.Luffy] cards.

OP13-007.name: Ace & Sabo & Luffy
OP13-007.effect: [Activate: Main] You may give 1 of your active DON!! cards to 1 of your Leader or Character cards and trash this Character: Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −3000 power during this turn.

OP13-008.name: Emporio.Ivankov
OP13-008.effect: If your {Revolutionary Army} type Character would be K.O.'d by your opponent's effect, you may trash this Character instead.

OP13-009.name: Curly.Dadan
OP13-009.effect: If you have a {Mountain Bandits} type Character other than this card, this Character gains [Double Attack].

OP13-012.name: Nefeltari Vivi
OP13-012.effect: [On Play] Look at 4 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Alabasta} or {Straw Hat Crew} type card with a cost of 2 or more and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

OP13-013.name: Higuma
OP13-013.effect: [On Play] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 0 power or less.

OP13-015.name: Makino
OP13-015.effect: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Character: Up to 1 of your [Monkey.D.Luffy] cards gains +2000 power during this turn.

OP13-016.name: Monkey.D.Garp
OP13-016.effect: [On Play] If your Leader is [Sabo], [Portgas.D.Ace] or [Monkey.D.Luffy], look at 4 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 card with a cost of 3 or more and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

OP13-017.name: Monkey.D.Dragon
OP13-017.effect: [Once Per Turn] If your {Revolutionary Army} type Character would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect, you may give this Character −2000 power during this turn instead.

OP13-019.name: But Ace Here Said You Deserved It!!
OP13-019.effect: [Main] You may rest 4 of your DON!! cards: Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −3000 power during this turn. Then, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 3000 power or less.

OP13-020.name: Meteor Fist
OP13-020.effect: [Main] Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −5000 power during this turn.

OP13-021.name: Gum-Gum Gatling Gun
OP13-021.effect: [Main] Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to 1 of your [Monkey.D.Luffy] cards. Then, give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −2000 power during this turn.

OP13-022.name: Windmill Village
OP13-022.effect: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Stage: Up to 1 of your Characters with 2000 base power or less gains +1000 power during this turn.

OP13-023.name: Uta
OP13-023.effect: [On Play] Set up to 2 of your DON!! cards as active. Then, you cannot play Character cards with a base cost of 5 or more during this turn.

OP13-024.name: Gordon
OP13-024.effect: [On Play] You may reveal 1 {Music} or {FILM} type card from your hand: Set up to 2 of your DON!! cards as active at the end of this turn.

OP13-025.name: Koby
OP13-025.effect: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)

OP13-026.name: Sunny-Kun
OP13-026.effect: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may rest 1 of your DON!! cards: This Character gains +2000 power until the end of your opponent's next turn.

OP13-027.name: Sanji
OP13-027.effect: [On Play] Set up to 2 of your DON!! cards as active.

OP13-028.name: Shanks
OP13-028.effect: [On Play] Set all of your DON!! cards as active. Then, you cannot play cards from your hand during this turn.

OP13-030.name: Tony Tony.Chopper
OP13-030.effect: [On Play] Set up to 2 of your DON!! cards as active.

OP13-031.name: Trafalgar Law
OP13-031.effect: If you have 1 or less Life cards, this Character gains [Blocker].

OP13-032.name: Nico Robin
OP13-032.effect: [On Play] Up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 8 or less cannot be rested until the end of your opponent's next End Phase.

OP13-033.name: Franky
OP13-033.effect: [On K.O.] Rest up to 2 of your opponent's cards.

OP13-034.name: Brook
OP13-034.effect: [On Play] If your Leader has the {FILM} or {Straw Hat Crew} type, set up to 1 of your DON!! cards as active.

OP13-035.name: Bepo
OP13-035.effect: [End of Your Turn] Set this Character or up to 1 of your DON!! cards as active.

OP13-037.name: Roronoa Zoro
OP13-037.effect: [On Play] If your Leader has the {FILM} or {Straw Hat Crew} type, set up to 2 of your DON!! cards as active.

OP13-038.name: Gum-Gum Elephant Gun
OP13-038.effect: [Main] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 5 or less. Then, set up to 2 of your DON!! cards as active at the end of this turn.

OP13-039.name: Gum-Gum Snake Shot
OP13-039.effect: [Counter] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters with a cost of 4 or less.

OP13-040.name: I Know You're Strong... So I'll Go All Out from the Very Start!!!
OP13-040.effect: [Main] You may rest 2 of your DON!! cards: Up to 2 of your opponent's rested Characters with a cost of 7 or less will not become active in your opponent's next Refresh Phase.

OP13-043.name: Otama
OP13-043.effect: [On Play] If you have 3 or less Life cards, draw 2 cards and trash 1 card from your hand.

OP13-044.name: Curiel
OP13-044.effect: [When Attacking] Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your Leader with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" or 1 Character with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates".

OP13-045.name: Haruta
OP13-045.effect: [When Attacking] If you have 4 or less cards in your hand, draw 1 card.

OP13-047.name: Fossa
OP13-047.effect: If your Character with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" would be K.O.'d by your opponent's effect, you may trash this Character instead.

OP13-050.name: Boa Sandersonia
OP13-050.effect: [On Play] If your Leader is [Boa Hancock], play up to 1 [Boa Hancock] with a cost of 3 or less from your hand.

OP13-051.name: Boa Hancock
card_type: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
OP13-051.effect: [On K.O.] If your Leader is [Boa Hancock] or multicolored, draw 2 cards.

OP13-053.name: Marshall.D.Teach
OP13-053.effect: [When Attacking] You may trash 1 of your Characters with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates": Draw 1 card and this Character gains [Banish] during this turn.

OP13-054.name: Yamato
OP13-054.effect: [On Play] If you have 3 or less Life cards, draw 2 cards. Then, give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your Leader.

OP13-055.name: Rakuyo
OP13-055.effect: [When Attacking] If you have 4 or less cards in your hand, all of your Characters with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" gain +1000 power during this turn.

OP13-056.name: LittleOars Jr.
OP13-056.effect: [When Attacking] If your Leader's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", draw 1 card.

OP13-057.name: If I Bowed Down to Power, What's the Point in Living?
OP13-057.effect: [Main] You may rest 1 of your DON!! cards: If you have 1 or less Life cards, your opponent cannot activate [Blocker] whenever your Leader attacks during this turn.

OP13-058.name: Phoenix Pyreapple
OP13-058.effect: [Main] You may rest 1 of your DON!! cards: Place up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 3000 power or less at the bottom of the owner's deck.

OP13-059.name: Brilliant Punk
OP13-059.effect: [Main] You may return 1 of your Characters to the owner's hand: Return up to 1 Character with a cost of 6 or less to the owner's hand.

OP13-060.name: Amatsuki Toki
OP13-060.effect: If your Character with a type including "Roger Pirates" would be K.O.'d by your opponent's effect, you may trash this Character instead.

OP13-061.name: Inuarashi
OP13-061.effect: [On Play] If you have any DON!! cards given, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it. Then, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 1 or less.

OP13-062.name: Crocus
OP13-062.effect: [On Play] If you have any DON!! cards given, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.

OP13-063.name: Kouzuki Oden
OP13-063.effect: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)

OP13-064.name: Gol.D.Roger
OP13-064.effect: Your Leader and all of your Characters that do not have a type including "Roger Pirates" have their effects negated.

OP13-065.name: Shanks
OP13-065.effect: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 card with a type including "Roger Pirates" other than [Shanks] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

OP13-067.name: Scopper Gaban
OP13-067.effect: [On Play] If your Leader's type includes "Roger Pirates", draw 2 cards and trash 1 card from your hand. Then, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it.

OP13-068.name: Douglas Bullet
OP13-068.effect: If you have 8 or more DON!! cards on your field, this Character gains +2000 power.

OP13-069.name: Tom
OP13-069.effect: [On Play] DON!! −1: Add up to 1 Stage card with a cost of 3 or less from your trash to your hand.

OP13-071.name: Nekomamushi
OP13-071.effect: [On Play] If you have 8 or more DON!! cards on your field, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 3000 base power or less.

OP13-072.name: Buggy
OP13-072.effect: [On Play] If your Leader's type includes "Roger Pirates" and you have any DON!! cards given, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it.

OP13-074.name: Hera
OP13-074.effect: [On Play] Play up to 1 {Homies} type Character card with 3000 power or less from your hand.

OP13-075.name: Guess We'll Have Another Scrap. You Can Only Risk Death While You're Still Alive!!
OP13-075.effect: [Main] You may rest 1 of your DON!! cards: If your Leader is [Gol.D.Roger] and you have any DON!! cards given, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it.

OP13-076.name: Divine Departure
OP13-076.effect: [Main] You may rest 5 of your DON!! cards: If you have any DON!! cards given, give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −8000 power during this turn.

OP13-077.name: Go All the Way to the Top!!
OP13-077.effect: [Main] You may rest 3 of your DON!! cards: If you have any DON!! cards given, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 4000 base power or less and up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 3000 base power or less.

OP13-078.name: Oro Jackson
OP13-078.effect: [Once Per Turn] When your Character with a type including "Roger Pirates" is removed from the field by your opponent's effect, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it.

OP13-079.name: Imu
OP13-079.effect: Under the rules of this game, you cannot include Events with a cost of 2 or more in your deck and at the start of the game, play up to 1 {Mary Geoise} type Stage card from your deck.

OP13-080.name: St. Ethanbaron V. Nusjuro
OP13-080.effect: If you have 7 or more cards in your trash, this Character cannot be removed from the field by your opponent's effects and gains [Rush].

OP13-081.name: Koala
OP13-081.effect: If your Leader has the {Revolutionary Army} type, this Character gains +3 cost.

OP13-082.name: Five Elders
OP13-082.effect: [Activate: Main] If your Leader is [Imu], you may rest 1 of your DON!! cards and trash 1 card from your hand: Trash all of your Characters and play up to 5 {Five Elders} type Character cards with 5000 power and different card names from your trash.

OP13-083.name: St. Jaygarcia Saturn
OP13-083.effect: If you have 7 or more cards in your trash, this Character cannot be removed from the field by your opponent's effects.

OP13-084.name: St. Shepherd Ju Peter
OP13-084.effect: If you have 7 or more cards in your trash, this Character cannot be removed from the field by your opponent's effects.

OP13-086.name: Saint Shalria
OP13-086.effect: [On Play] Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Celestial Dragons} type card other than [Saint Shalria] and add it to your hand. Then, trash the rest and trash 1 card from your hand.

OP13-087.name: Saint Charlos
OP13-087.effect: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)

OP13-089.name: St. Topman Warcury
OP13-089.effect: If you have 7 or more cards in your trash, this Character cannot be removed from the field by your opponent's effects and gains [Blocker].

OP13-091.name: St. Marcus Mars
OP13-091.effect: If you have 7 or more cards in your trash, this Character cannot be removed from the field by your opponent's effects and gains [Blocker].

OP13-092.name: Saint Mjosgard
OP13-092.effect: [On Play] If you have 3 or less Life cards, play up to 1 {Mary Geoise} type Stage card with a cost of 1 from your trash.

OP13-093.name: Morgans
OP13-093.effect: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)

OP13-094.name: York
OP13-094.effect: [On Play] Up to 1 of your {Celestial Dragons} type Characters gains +2000 power during this turn.

OP13-095.name: Saint Rosward
OP13-095.effect: [On Play] You may trash 1 card from your hand: If you only have {Celestial Dragons} type Characters, K.O. up to 2 of your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 3 or less.

OP13-096.name: The Five Elders Are at Your Service!!!
OP13-096.effect: [Main] Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Celestial Dragons} type card other than [The Five Elders Are at Your Service!!!] and add it to your hand. Then, trash the rest.

OP13-097.name: The World's Equilibrium Cannot Be Maintained Forever
OP13-097.effect: [Main] You may rest 5 of your DON!! cards: If the only Characters on your field are {Celestial Dragons} type Characters, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 6 or less.

OP13-098.name: Never Existed... in the First Place...
OP13-098.effect: [Main] You may rest 1 of your DON!! cards: If your Leader is [Imu], K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Stages with a cost of 7.

OP13-099.name: The Empty Throne
OP13-099.effect: [Your Turn] If you have 19 or more cards in your trash, your Leader gains +1000 power.

OP13-100.name: Jewelry Bonney
OP13-100.effect: [Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] This effect can be activated when you play a Character with a [Trigger]. Give up to 2 rested DON!! cards to 1 of your Leader or Character cards.

OP13-102.name: Edison
OP13-102.effect: [Activate: Main] You may trash this Character: If the number of your Life cards is equal to or less than the number of your opponent's Life cards, draw 1 card. Then, rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 3 or less.

OP13-105.name: Kouzuki Momonosuke
OP13-105.effect: [On Play] Look at all of your Life cards and place them back in your Life area in any order.

OP13-106.name: Conney
OP13-106.effect: [Opponent's Turn] When a [Trigger] activates, this Character gains [Blocker] during this turn.

OP13-108.name: Jewelry Bonney
OP13-108.effect: [On Play] If your Leader has the {Egghead} type, this Character gains [Rush] during this turn. Then, your opponent adds 1 card from the top of their Life cards to their hand.

OP13-109.name: Jewelry Bonney
OP13-109.effect: If this Character would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect, you may turn 1 card from the top of your Life cards face-up instead.

OP13-112.name: Vegapunk
OP13-112.effect: If you have a total of 2 or more given DON!! cards, this Character gains [Blocker].

OP13-113.name: Lilith
OP13-113.effect: [On Play] Look at 4 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 card with a [Trigger] other than [Lilith] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

OP13-114.name: S-Snake
OP13-114.effect: [On Play]/[When Attacking] You may turn 1 card from the top of your Life cards face-up: Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −2000 power during this turn.

OP13-115.name: Paper Art Afterimage
OP13-115.effect: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +3000 power during this battle. Then, if your opponent has 2 or less Life cards, up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +1000 power during this turn.

OP13-116.name: The One Who Is the Most Free Is the Pirate King!!!
OP13-116.effect: [Main] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Supernovas} type Character card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

OP13-117.name: Gum-Gum Dawn Stamp
OP13-117.effect: [Main] You may turn 1 card from the top of your Life cards face-up: K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 6 or less.

OP13-119.name: Portgas.D.Ace
OP13-119.effect: If you have 3 or less Life cards, this Character gains [Rush].
